title: cyclobalanus rassa
intro: Cyclobalanus rassa, also known as the Cyclobalanus rassa plant, is a species of plant in the family Ericaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Southeast Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of the Cyclobalanus rassa plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. Cyclobalanus rassa can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
